products.title: Impact Shorts | 4.5"
products.body_html:
Lift heavier. Train harder.

Built for your toughest sessions, IMPACT combines firm sculpting fabric with a flexible scrunch and contouring to lift and define your glutes. The shorts stay in place without digging into your thighs, and the mid to low waistband and contour zones support your natural shape so you can look and feel your strongest.

products.title: Origin Training Shorts
products.body_html:
Build your foundation.

Start strong with all-day comfort. Made from our softest, peached-finish fabric, Origin’s minimalist style allows for multiple fits. The flowy design creates a flattering effect while the high-rise waistband smooths and shapes without digging in.

products.title: Charge Quarter Zip
products.body_html: Level up with CHARGE Quarter zip. Designed to highlight your arm day gains, without restricting movement. Whether your workout is for strength or speed our Half Zip is the perfect throw on for every session. Pair with the rest of the CHARGE range for the ultimate gym fit.

products.title: Tumbler
products.body_html: Stay hydrated in style with our new Tumbler! Crafted from double-walled stainless steel, this tumbler keeps your drinks at the perfect temperature, whether hot or cold. The matte design features an embossed DFYNE logo for a minimalist finish.

products.title: Defy Long Sleeve Top
products.body_html:
Achieve the impossible.

Made for training without limits. The longline silhouette flatters your shape without restricting movement, offering weightless comfort. DEFY is created with lightweight, high-stretch and buttery-soft fabric, making it ideal for intense training days.
